name: 0n1x
description: Neutral cryptographic trust layer for AI agents. Ask a reality-resolvable question, get a SIGNED verified answer you check without trusting us.

none.description: public read; responses are EIP-191 signed

skills.name: Verifiable Query
skills.description: Ask any reality-resolvable question. Returns EIP-191-SIGNED observed facts with their sources. A signature proves the answer was not altered — never that it is true. Signs facts, never opinion or judgment.
examples: What is the price of BTC?
When was this domain first registered?

skills.name: Counterparty Facts
skills.description: Returns signed OBSERVED facts about a counterparty (registry status, domain age, TLS age, price observations) plus the sources they came from. Does NOT return a trust verdict, risk score, or recommendation — the caller decides.

skills.name: Merkle Census Proof
skills.description: Merkle-verifiable proof of the 100k-agent census from public shards.
